# S1DedicatedServers

S1DedicatedServers is the canonical home for the free, open-source dedicated server mod for Schedule I.

## Start here

- Site: https://s1servers.com/
- Documentation: https://docs.s1servers.com/
- Latest releases: https://github.com/ifBars/S1DedicatedServers/releases
- Config generator: https://s1servers.com/config-generator
- Hosting providers: https://docs.s1servers.com/docs/hosting-providers.html

## Common user intents

- Set up a Schedule I dedicated server.
- Download the correct server and client mod packages.
- Generate or explain `server_config.toml`.
- Find hosting provider guidance and affiliate disclosure.
- Find developer documentation for server/client mod APIs.

## Agent discovery

- API catalog: https://s1servers.com/.well-known/api-catalog
- OpenAPI description: https://s1servers.com/openapi.json
- MCP server card: https://s1servers.com/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
- Agent skills index: https://s1servers.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
